title: 1200ml Rapid Ramen Bowl with Filterable Lid, Stainless Steel Noodle Bowl with Spoon Chopsticks BPA Free Ramen Cooker Bowls with Handle Dishwasher Safe Noodles Cooker for College Dorm Home Office
features: 【1200ML Capacity & With Mobile Phone Holder】The stainless steel instant noodles bowl has 1200ml large capacity, which can be easily used for instant noodles. It can also be used as a daily lunch box to meet your appetite. And, the cup lid transforms into a mobile phone holder, liberating both hands and allowing you to eat and watch tv without delay.

【With Spoon and Chopsticks】This rapid ramen bowl set contains 1 foldable stainless steel spoon and 1 pair of foldable stainless steel chopsticks that is convenient to use especially for busy people. No need to bring additional utensils.

【Dishwasher Safe】This rapid ramen bowl is made of premium food grade 304 stainless steel and PP material that is BPA free, odorless, eco-friendly and safe to use. Also, the ramen bowl set is reusable and easy to clean that is dishwasher safe. Perfect for instant ramen, convenient and practical.

【Practical to Use】This rapid ramen bowl features a handle for easier move. And the rapid ramen bowl has a special design that can be used as a phone stand when watch a video. The lid features a filterable design for drainage the water and easily separate the soup from the noodles. It is practical and offers a convenience.

【Wide Application】This rapid ramen bowl is suitable for instant noodles, soups, rice, cereal bowls, sodas, pasta, etc. Also, it is be used as a lunch box, fruit box or sandwich box which is easy to carry food on the go. It is a practical gift for your family, friends, colleagues, etc.
description: Product Description Rapid Ramen Bowl Note There may be slight differences between the picture and the actual color of the commodity Please allow slight dimension difference due to manual measurement. It is large enough to cook 2 servings of ramen. Economical and Reusable: This rapid ramen bowl is washable and reusable which can be used for long time and save our money.
